languages.text: [Сложить аквилу и взмолиться] "Отринь страх и боль. Затми их светом Его и дай ему выжечь скверну дотла".
[Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."
languages.original_text: [Сложить аквилу и взмолиться] "Отринь страх и боль. Затми их светом Его и дай ему выжечь скверну дотла".

languages.text: [Hacer el signo del Aquila y ofrecer una plegaria] «Libérate del miedo y del dolor. Que Su luz los eclipse y abrase la corrupción hasta reducirla a polvo».
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

traits.locale_text: [Hacer el signo del Aquila y ofrecer una plegaria] «Libérate del miedo y del dolor. Que Su luz los eclipse y abrase la corrupción hasta reducirla a polvo».

languages.text: 【做出双头鹰手势并念诵祷词】“抛却恐惧与痛苦。以祂之光辉遮蔽一切，焚尽所有腐败。”
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

traits.locale_text: 【做出双头鹰手势并念诵祷词】“抛却恐惧与痛苦。以祂之光辉遮蔽一切，焚尽所有腐败。”

languages.text: [Faire le signe de l'Aquila et offrir une prière] « Défaites-vous de la peur et de la douleur. Que Sa lumière les éclipse et réduise toute corruption en cendres. »
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

traits.locale_text: [Faire le signe de l'Aquila et offrir une prière] « Défaites-vous de la peur et de la douleur. Que Sa lumière les éclipse et réduise toute corruption en cendres. »

languages.text: [Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yap ve dua oku] "Korkuyu ve acıyı söküp at. O'nun ışığıyla onları gölgede bırak ve tüm yozlaşmayı yakıp küle çevirmesine izin ver."
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

traits.locale_text: [Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yap ve dua oku] "Korkuyu ve acıyı söküp at. O'nun ışığıyla onları gölgede bırak ve tüm yozlaşmayı yakıp küle çevirmesine izin ver."

languages.text: [Zeichen des Adlers machen und ein Gebet anbieten] "Befreit Euch von Furcht und Schmerz. Verdeckt sie mit Seinem Licht, auf dass es alle Verderbtheit verbrennen möge."
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

languages.text: ［アクィラの印を切り、祈りを捧げる］「恐れと痛みを捨て去れ。御方の光でそれらを覆い隠し、あらゆる穢れを塵となるまで焼き払わせよ」
languages.original_text: [Make the sign of the Aquila and offer a prayer] "Cast off fear and pain. Eclipse them with His light and let it burn all corruption to dust."

traits.locale_text: ［アクィラの印を切り、祈りを捧げる］「恐れと痛みを捨て去れ。御方の光でそれらを覆い隠し、あらゆる穢れを塵となるまで焼き払わせよ」
